html:
Exclusive to:

Infused Moon Shards are a resource exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them.

Infused Moon Shards can be obtained by mining the randomly spawned Charged Glassy Rocks in Moonstorms. The Celestial Champion also drops 6-12 of them upon its death.

After Lunar Rift is activated, Lunar Hail will periodically happens. During Lunar Hail, lunar glass will be embedded in Structures, Trees and other Objects around the world. Clearing these objects has chance to drop Infused Moon Shards from it.

Wilson with the Lunar Innovator Skill can craft 2 Infused Moon Shards with 1 Pure Brilliance, as well as use 3 Infused Moon Shards to craft 1 Pure Brilliance.

After 12 minutes, Infused Moon Shards "spoil" and leave behind regular Moon Shards.

Usage

Infused Moon Shards are used to upgrade the Lunar Siphonator into its second and complete stages, which is needed for summoning Celestial Champion. The second stage requires 10 shards, while to complete it requires 20.

×3

×4

×4

×6

×8

Trivia

  • Infused Moon Shards were introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.
  • When it was first introduced, this item only took 90 seconds to spoil into Moon Glass. Its fast spoil time encouraged players to have some Bundling Wrap handy, as getting to the Lunar Island within 90 seconds was virtually impossible without teleportation. This was changed in the October 2021 QoL update.
  • Dropping models of Infused Moon Shard actually correspond one-to-one to the regular Moon Shard.

Exclusive to:
“I should put this to scientific use before the energy fades!”
–Wilson
“It's like there's a little fire inside.”
–Willow
“Sharp and glowy stuff.”
–Wolfgang
“It feels almost alive, somehow.”
–Wendy
“DANGEROUSLY SHARP AND FULLY CHARGED. SUPERB”
–WX-78
“The energy seems unstable, I'll have to be quick to put it to any use.”
–Wickerbottom
“These pieces still have a glow to 'em.”
–Woodie
“Nearly as sharp as I am, but with a garish glow.”
–Maxwell
“Tis lit by a strange pöwer.”
–Wigfrid
“There's still lighting stuck inside!”
–Webber
“Its still warm.”
–Warly
“Glowy sharp things”
–Wormwood
“I'd better hustle, the energy's not gonna last long.”
–Winona
“I should make haste before they go to waste.”
–Wortox
“Is sharp glowy things.”
–Wurt
“It's light and glowy.”
–Walter
“It's not going to stay charged for long.”
–Wanda
Infused Moon Shards are a resource exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them.
Infused Moon Shards can be obtained by mining the randomly spawned Charged Glassy Rocks in Moonstorms. The Celestial Champion also drops 6-12 of them upon its death.
After Lunar Rift is activated, Lunar Hail will periodically happens. During Lunar Hail, lunar glass will be embedded in Structures, Trees and other Objects around the world. Clearing these objects has chance to drop Infused Moon Shards from it.
Wilson with the Lunar Innovator Skill can craft 2 Infused Moon Shards with 1 Pure Brilliance, as well as use 3 Infused Moon Shards to craft 1 Pure Brilliance.
After 12 minutes, Infused Moon Shards "spoil" and leave behind regular Moon Shards.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Infused Moon Shards are used to upgrade the Lunar Siphonator into its second and complete stages, which is needed for summoning Celestial Champion. The second stage requires 10 shards, while to complete it requires 20.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Infused Moon Shards were introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.
When it was first introduced, this item only took 90 seconds to spoil into Moon Glass. Its fast spoil time encouraged players to have some Bundling Wrap handy, as getting to the Lunar Island within 90 seconds was virtually impossible without teleportation. This was changed in the October 2021 QoL update.
Dropping models of Infused Moon Shard actually correspond one-to-one to the regular Moon Shard.

Infused Moon Shards can be obtained by mining the randomly spawned [[Charged Glassy Rock]]s in [[Moonstorm]]s. The [[Celestial Champion]] also drops 6-12 of them upon its death. After [[Lunar Rift]] is activated, [[Lunar Hail]] will periodically happens. During Lunar Hail, lunar glass will be embedded in Structures, Trees and other Objects around the world. Clearing these objects has chance to drop Infused Moon Shards from it. [[Wilson/Don't Starve Together|Wilson]] with the {{picDark|24|Lunar Innovator}} ''[[Lunar Innovator]]'' Skill can craft 2 Infused Moon Shards with 1 [[Pure Brilliance]], as well as use 3 Infused Moon Shards to craft 1 Pure Brilliance. After 12 minutes, Infused Moon Shards "spoil" and leave behind regular [[Moon Shard]]s. == {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage == Infused Moon Shards are used to upgrade the [[Lunar Siphonator]] into its second and complete stages, which is needed for summoning Celestial Champion. This was changed in the October 2021 QoL update. * Dropping models of [[Infused Moon Shard]] actually correspond one-to-one to the regular [[Moon Shard]].
